mapper.update: update farm_work set effectiveJobArea = #{farmWork.effectiveJobArea} , wkt_poly = #{farmWork.wktPoly} , insertTime = now() where did = #{farmWork.did} and jobEndTime = #{farmWork.jobEndTime}
mapper.select: select did, jobWidth from farm_work_split_day where jobDay = #{day} and jobWidth is not null limit 0,100
